Title: Beruete y Moret, A., de
Overview: Published the volume on Velazquez in the Prado Museum, in the "Art in Spain" series by the Hispanic Society of America.
Selected Bibliography: Guadalajara. Alcaláde Henares. Art in Spain, [published] under the Patronage of the Hispanic Society of America. Barcelona: Hijos de J. Thomas, 1913.
